title: The Log Is The Agent - Ishaan Sehgal, Omnara
summary: Ishaan Sehgal argues that as models commoditize, agent identity and state should be stored in durable, append-only session logs rather than in frameworks or tools. This shift treats the log as the primitive, enabling properties like durability, continuity, forkability, and portability across different models and machines.
